name: Slash
tagline: An open source, self-hosted links shortener and sharing platform.
description:
An open source, self-hosted links shortener and sharing platform.

Docs: https://github.com/yourselfhosted/slash?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  slash:
    image: yourselfhosted/slash
    volumes:
      - slash-data:/var/opt/slash
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - wget
        - -q
        - --spider
        - http://127.0.0.1:5231
      interval: 2s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 15
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42112:5231
volumes:
  slash-data: null
